=== Bob Dylan Verona 29 May 84 PA.md5

2fd730e952a894ee41819be7d0f121d1 *Bob Dylan Verona 29 May 84 PA.txt
===================
===================
===================
=== Bob Dylan Verona 29 May 84 PA.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Arena di Verona
Verona, Italy
29 May 1984

Line/PA recording

1. Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic, w/Carlos Santana)
2. Tombstone Blues (w/ Carlos Santana & tour band)

Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Mick Taylor (guitar)
Ian MacLagan (keyboards)
Greg Sutton (bass)
Colin Allen (drums)

Resuming my series of Dylan arcana, but not where I left off.

The extant line recordings from the second gig on Dylan's 1984 tour. Apparently somebody wanted to pass just the Dylan/Santana tracks around, the concert's final two songs. Neither song officially released; "Real Live" is drawn only from the July 5, 7 and 8 concerts.

 





 
===================
===================
===================
